title: Isard (disambiguation)
content:
'''Isard''' can refer to the following:

== Canon ==
*'''[[Armand Isard]]''', a [[Gender|male]] [[Director of COMPNOR|Director]] of the [[Commission for the Preservation of the New Order]] and member of the [[Joint Chiefs of the Imperial Military]]

== Legends ==
*[[Armand Isard/Legends|'''Armand Isard''']], a Human male who served as the [[Director of the Senate Bureau of Intelligence]] and of the [[Director of Republic Intelligence|Republic Intelligence]] and later the [[Director of Imperial Intelligence|Imperial Intelligence]]
*'''[[Ysanne Isard]]''', [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who served as the [[Director of Imperial Intelligence]] and the daughter of Armand
**[[Ysanne Isard (clone)]], a clone of the former

== Real world ==
*'''''[[Rise of Isard]]''''', an overarching story-arc in the ''Star Wars'' Legends comic series ''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron]]''
*'''''[[X-Wing: Isard's Revenge]]''''', a Legends novel in the ''[[Star Wars: X-Wing (novel series)|Star Wars: X-Wing]]'' [[Star Wars: X-Wing (novel series)|novel series]] published in 1999
